About RideVibes Bali

Ride with locals.
Experience the real Bali.

At RideVibes Bali, we believe that the best way to experience Bali is through authentic local knowledge, genuine hospitality, and unforgettable adventures.

Founded by a passionate local tourism professional with over a decade of experience, RideVibes Bali was created to offer travelers more than just a tour—we create meaningful experiences. Since 2015, our founder has worked in Bali's tourism industry as a professional surfing instructor and later as a tour leader for one of Bali's leading travel companies. These years of hands-on experience have helped us understand what visitors truly value: safety, honesty, flexibility, and unforgettable memories.

Today, RideVibes Bali proudly offers carefully selected experiences including Surf Lessons, ATV Adventures, River Tubing, Rice Terrace Tours, Monkey Forest visits, Waterfalls, and customized Bali day trips.

Our mission is simple: to provide friendly, professional, and personalized service with transparent pricing and no hidden costs.

Whether you're catching your first wave or exploring Bali's natural beauty, RideVibes Bali is here to make your adventure safe, exciting, and unforgettable.

Ride with locals. Experience the real Bali.

Our Philosophy
"From Ocean to Jungle, Connecting You with Nature."

We believe your Bali trip should be more than a beach selfie. It should be the waves at sunrise, the jungle at midday, the rice fields at golden hour — all in one breath.

Ocean to Jungle: What a Full Day with Us Looks Like
Ever wondered what it feels like to go from catching waves in the morning to exploring Bali's wild jungle in the afternoon? This full-day adventure combines surfing, ATV rides, river tubing, and cultural spots, giving you the perfect mix of adrenaline, nature, and unforgettable memories.

Bali Guide
Why Tegalalang Rice Terrace is Still Worth the Trip
One of Bali's most iconic landscapes, Tegallalang Rice Terrace remains a must-visit destination. From breathtaking sunrise views and local coffee spots to hidden walking paths and jungle swings, here's why this famous rice terrace still deserves a spot on your Bali itinerary.

Activity
River Tubing in Bali: Everything You Need to Know
Looking for a fun and unique adventure? River tubing in Bali offers the perfect combination of excitement and nature. Float through hidden jungle rivers, pass waterfalls, and experience Bali from a different perspective. Here's everything you need to prepare before your ride.

Adventure
ATV Through Bali's Jungle: Raw, Wild & Unforgettable
Get off the beaten path and into Bali's wild side. Ride through muddy jungle trails, rivers, tunnels, and hidden villages for an ATV experience packed with adrenaline. This is one of the best ways to explore Bali beyond the beaches.

Explore Bali beneath the surface and discover a whole new world of crystal-clear waters, colorful coral reefs, and tropical marine life. Got Questions? We Have Answers.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need experience for surfing lessons?
Not at all. Our surf lessons are beginner-friendly and suitable for all levels. Our local instructors will guide you step by step, from basic techniques to catching your first wave.
What should I bring for the tour?
We recommend bringing swimwear, a towel, sunscreen, comfortable clothes, and a change of clothes. For jungle activities like ATV or tubing, be prepared to get wet and muddy.
Are your tours private or shared?
We offer both private and small-group experiences. You can choose the option that best fits your travel style and budget.
Is hotel pickup included?
Yes, hotel pickup and drop-off are available for selected areas in Bali. Please contact us before booking to confirm your location.
Can I combine multiple activities in one day?
Absolutely. Our "From Ocean to Jungle" concept allows you to combine surfing, ATV, river tubing, snorkeling, rice terrace visits, and more into one custom adventure.
Is snorkeling suitable for beginners?
Yes. Most snorkeling trips are beginner-friendly and include safety equipment and guidance. You don't need prior experience to enjoy it.
What happens if the weather is bad?
Safety comes first. If weather or ocean conditions are not suitable, we may reschedule your activity or offer an alternative experience.
How do I book a tour?
Booking is easy. You can contact us directly through WhatsApp, Instagram, or our website booking form.
Do you provide photos or videos?
Yes, depending on the package, we can help capture your experience so you can take home unforgettable memories.
Can you create custom Bali tours?
Yes. If you have your own itinerary or want a personalized adventure, we can help design a custom experience based on your interests and schedule.

Everything You Need to Know

What's Included

✅ Professional Local Guide
✅ Friendly & Experienced Surf Instructor
✅ High-Quality Surf Equipment
✅ Complimentary Mineral Water
✅ Safety Briefing Before Every Activity
✅ Transparent Pricing — No Hidden Costs
📍 Meeting Point
Meet us in front of Zanzibar Restaurant, Legian Beach for surfing lessons and activities with a designated meeting point.
🚗 Hotel Pickup & Drop-off
Available for selected packages. Transportation depends on the number of participants and the tour package booked. Please contact us for pickup availability in your area.
🗺️ Tour Packages
Private and shared tours are available. Pickup and drop-off arrangements may vary depending on the itinerary and group size.

What's Not Included

❌ Personal expenses
❌ Meals and beverages (unless stated in the package)
❌ Travel insurance
❌ Personal purchases and souvenirs
❌ Tips and gratuities (optional but appreciated)
❌ Additional activities not listed in the selected package
❌ Entrance fees (unless specified as included)
❌ Pickup & drop-off outside the designated service area (additional charges may apply)
